name: Chickpea Curry (Chana Masala)
tagline: Pantry-perfect chickpea curry in tomato-onion masala — restaurant in 30

hero.alt: Chana masala with chickpeas in red gravy and cilantro
hero.caption: chana masala — restaurant home

steps.title: Sizzle cumin
steps.detail: Heat 3 tbsp oil over medium-high. Add cumin seeds. Once they splutter, add diced onion. Cook 8 min until golden brown.
steps.tip: The browner the onion, the deeper the masala. Don't pull early.

steps.title: Garlic-ginger and tomato
steps.detail: Stir in garlic-ginger paste 1 min. Add tomatoes, salt, cook 6 min until they break down and oil separates.
steps.tip: Mash tomato with a spatula as it cooks for a smoother gravy.

steps.title: Spices and chickpeas
steps.detail: Bloom coriander, chili powder, amchur 30 sec. Add drained chickpeas and 1 cup water. Simmer 12 min, mashing some chickpeas against the side.
steps.tip: Mashing 1/4 of the chickpeas thickens the gravy without flour.

steps.title: Garam masala and finish
steps.detail: Off heat, stir in garam masala and cilantro. Squeeze of lemon if you have it.
steps.tip: Serve with basmati rice or roti — flavor sponge.

healthFacts: Chickpeas pack ~15g protein and 13g fiber per cup.
Amchur (dried mango powder) gives the signature tang without lemon.
